directors.name: Lamberto Andreotti
directors.bio_summary: Former Chair and Chief Executive Officer of Bristol-Myers Squibb. Serves on the Nomination and Governance Committee as Chair. Currently holds no other public board seats.

directors.name: Robert A. Brown
directors.bio_summary: President of Boston University. Serves on the Sustainability, Safety & Innovation Committee as Chair. Currently holds no other public board seats.

directors.name: James C. Collins, Jr.
directors.bio_summary: Chief Executive Officer of Corteva, Inc. As the company's CEO, he is the only non-independent director on the board. Currently holds no other public board seats.

directors.name: Klaus A. Engel
directors.bio_summary: Retired Chief Executive Officer of Evonik Industries. Currently holds no other public board seats.

directors.name: Michael O. Johanns
directors.bio_summary: Retired U.S. Senator. Currently serves on 1 other public board.

directors.name: Lois D. Juliber
directors.bio_summary: Former Vice Chairman of Colgate-Palmolive Company. Currently serves on 1 other public board.

directors.name: Rebecca B. Liebert
directors.bio_summary: Executive Vice President at PPG Industries, Inc. Currently holds no other public board seats outside of the filer.

directors.name: Marcos M. Lutz
directors.bio_summary: Chief Executive Officer of Cosan Limited. Currently serves on 1 other public board.

directors.name: Nayaki Nayyar
directors.bio_summary: President of Digital Service and Operations Management at BMC Software. Currently holds no other public board seats.

directors.name: Gregory R. Page
directors.bio_summary: Retired Chair and Chief Executive Officer of Cargill, Incorporated. Serves as independent Chair of the Board of Directors and as Chair of the Audit Committee. Currently serves on 3 other public boards.

directors.name: Lee M. Thomas
directors.bio_summary: Former Chair and Chief Executive Officer of Rayonier Inc. Has played an important role in setting the strategy for the Company and overseeing its separation from DowDuPont, Inc. Currently holds no other public board seats.

directors.name: Patrick J. Ward
directors.bio_summary: Former Chief Financial Officer of Cummins Inc. Serves as Chair of the People and Compensation Committee. Currently holds no other public board seats.

extraction_notes: Director bios were limited in detail within the extracted proxy text; ages, independence status, and committee roles were drawn from the summary table. The 'other_public_boards' count was indicated numerically in the table (e.g., Page=3, Johanns=1, Juliber=1, Lutz=1) but specific company names for those additional boards were not provided in the extracted text, so only explicitly named companies (e.g., PPG Industries for Liebert, Cosan Limited for Lutz) are listed. Patrick J. Ward appears to chair the People and Compensation Committee based on 'C' marker in that column, though his role is labeled audit_committee_chair due to the proxy table layout ambiguity. Gregory R. Page serves as Board Chair and also chairs the Audit Committee per the table. No executive officer section was included in the extracted text. Tenure years were not stated for any director.
